mapper.update:
UPDATE work w SET w.work_status = CASE
WHEN TRUNC(w.work_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) < w.work_order_qty THEN 40 WHEN TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 20 WHEN TRUNC(w.work_date) > TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 10 ELSE 10 END, w.work_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_status != 0 AND w.work_status != 30
UPDATE plan p SET p.plan_wp_qty = ( SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0)), 0) FROM work w WHERE w.work_plan = p.plan_id AND w.work_status = 30 ) WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y'

UPDATE plan p SET p.plan_status = CASE WHEN NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) >= p.plan_fin_qty THEN 30 WHEN TRUNC(p.plan_edate) < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 40 WHEN TRUNC(p.plan_sdate) <= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND TRUNC(p.plan_edate) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) < p.plan_fin_qty THEN 20 WHEN TRUNC(p.plan_sdate) > TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 10 ELSE 10 END, p.plan_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y' AND p.plan_status != 0 AND p.plan_status != 30

UPDATE QC Q SET Q.QC_STATUS = CASE WHEN NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) >= NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) AND NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) > 0 THEN 30
WHEN TRUNC(Q.QC_DATE) < TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 40
WHEN TRUNC(Q.QC_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) AND NVL(Q.QC_PASS_QTY, 0) < NVL(Q.QC_QTY, 0) THEN 20
WHEN TRUNC(Q.QC_DATE) > TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 10
ELSE 10 END WHERE Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND Q.QC_STATUS != 0 AND Q.QC_STATUS != 30
